parameters.name: edit
parameters.label: Edit..
parameters.description: Clicking this opens a text editor to add/edit/delete text from the .

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The filesystem path and name of the file to load. Accepts and files.

parameters.name: syncfile
parameters.label: Sync to File
parameters.description: When On, loads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.  A filename must be specified.  Turning on the option will load the file from disk immediately.  If the file does not exist, it wil

parameters.name: defaultreadencoding
parameters.label: Default Read Encoding
parameters.description: Sets the expected file encoding format, or auto-detects the format.  UTF8, UTF16-LE, UTF16-BE, CP1252

parameters.name: loadonstart
parameters.label: Load on Start
parameters.description: When On, reloads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.

parameters.name: write
parameters.label: Write on Toe Save
parameters.description: When On, writes the contents of the out to the file on disk when the project is saved.

parameters.name: removeblank
parameters.label: Remove Blank Lines
parameters.description: When enabled, do not convert blank lines into empty rows when loading files.

parameters.name: fill
parameters.label: Fill Type
parameters.description: You can create and fill rows and columns of a table. Fill Type menu gives 5 options: Manual, Set Size, Set Size and Contents, Fill by Column, and Fill by Row. When a Fill option is chosen, you can gen

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: Defines the number of rows in the table, where applicable.

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: Defines the number of columns in the table, where applicable.

parameters.name: cellexpr
parameters.label: Cell Expression
parameters.description: used to fill each cell if the Fill Type is Set Size and Contents. Can include expressions and

parameters.name: includenames
parameters.label: Include Names
parameters.description: Creates an extra row at the top, or a column at the left for the names of the columns or rows, filled with the Include Names parameter.

parameters.name: fills
parameters.label: Fills
parameters.description: Sequence of fill information for

parameters.name: fills0names
parameters.label: Names
parameters.description: Space-separated names of one or more columns or rows. If it is an expression, each name can be the member of a python list, like . This parameter is the start of a sequential block.

parameters.name: fills0expr
parameters.label: Cell Expression
parameters.description: used to fill each cell if the Fill Type is Fill by Row or Fill by Column.  Can include expressions and .

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

examples.label: Populate a lookup table
examples.code:
t = op('table1')
t.clear()
t.appendRow(['name', 'value'])
t.appendRow(['speed', '1.5'])
t.appendRow(['scale', '0.8'])
